calendar.matters:
Petition To Order To Confirm Personal Property To Petitioner, Wife
Off Calendar Jul-10-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anne Paris Gyemant, Esq., for and with Lucia Kajima, Petitioner (appearing separately by video conference).

The Court notes and Ms. Gyemant confirms that there was a defect in notice. That said, the Court will waive the defective notice. Ms. Gyemany further confirms that she has not received any objections to the petition. After brief discussion, the Court takes the matter under submission with the intention to grant the pending petition.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Gomez. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court will issue an order to appear to the attorney Anne E. Gyemant Paris to appear on June 13, 2023. The petition to confirm personal property etc., is continued to June 13, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

Off Calendar May-24-2022 Continued To Aug-02-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Anne Gyemant Paris, via Zoom, for Lucia Kajima, Petitioner.

Counsel reports of working with the clinic to obtain additional information and of working with a colleague to assist with this matter due to its uncommon nature. The court confirms that counsel intends to file an amended petition.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Aug-02-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.
